titleStmt.title: SII 4.764: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 764. (A.R. No. 311 of 1892). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ svasti . śrīlakṣmībṛḍnābhijāṁbhōjabhuvō mukhabhuvāṁ ku
lē . pōtanābhidhō viprēṁdraḥ prabhūdbhuvanabhūṣaṇaḥ [. 1*]
vividhabudhanidhānē pāsudōvāgrahārē prathitapṛdhulavritti
¨rgōtrajaḥ kaśyapasya . nikhilasukhasupātrassaccaritreḥ pavi
trassadupakritiphalaśrīra¨rtthināṁ pārijātaḥ [. 2*] tasyēśva
rō nāma mahēśvarābhassūnu¨rnnayēnāsamacakṣurāsīt .
pāpāṁdhakadhvaṁsavidhau paṭīyānahīnabhōgī bhṛtabhūtibhūṣaḥ
[. 3*] tasmātkaśyapasannibhādudubhavadviṣṇussuputrōttamaḥ śrī
māneṟṟamanāmathēyavanitāratnēditispa¨rddhini . viṣṇvābhassu
manōmanorathakarassatyānurāgōnvahaṁ pradhvastāprati
mapratāpanarakaḥ kṣīṇāghasaṁkī¨rttinaḥ [. 4*] ratipatiri
va viṣṇō rukmiṇīvallabhāyāmudabhavadabhirāmō rāja
mākhyāṁbikāyāṁ . vubhayakulalalāmō viṣṇunāmnā supu
trō vinayanayadayāḍhyō māranāmābhidhēyaḥ [. 5*] śrīnāga
dēvakṣitipālamaulē ssanmaṁtribhāvaṁ bhajatassanābhiḥ .
tasyānujō dēvanamaṁtriva¨ryyassammānitānēkavanīpakō
bhūt [. 6*] sudhākarē kaśyapavaṁśavā¨rdhi¨rnnidhi[¨r]guṇānāmadhu
nāvalīnāṁ . kalpāṁghripau mārayadēvanākhyāvamātyamu
khyau bhuvanē vibhātaḥ [. 7*] vyōma¨rttīśvara . 1160 . mēyaśāka
śaradassū¨ryyōparāgē sahçōmāsē da¨rśadinēThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 4.764 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
